subcodes.first_line: A single pilgrimage of thine surpasseth a thousand pilgrimages. His be the praise, inasmuch as thou hast attained unto both commands. All praise be unto God for His infinite bounty and mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حجک خیر من الف حجه له الحمد بما فزت بالامرین الحمد لله از فضل نامتناهی الهی و رحمت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
